check_ins.content:
Focused on finalizing PR to fix Express Checkout button on web
Merged: fix Express Checkout on_behalf_of mismatch (apollos-admin); add reconciliation job queue and cursor tracking (apollos-cluster)
PR reviews: [APO-7445] Mobile Auth Screens getting zoomed in; persist canonical scripture query (APO-7384); Express Checkout on_behalf_of; migration admin UI for multi-source; recurring gifts with filtering, cancel, resume
Linear worked on: APO-7185 Per-church reconciliation DAGs at 1 AM church time; APO-7176 reconciliation amount normalization and canonical key handling (#2481)
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-cluster, apollos-shovel

Arch Pod
Merged on_behalf_of Express Checkout; merged cluster PR for Recon Dashboard; cleaned up two shovel PRs
PR reviews: [APO-7398] Make Redis optional locally; persist canonical scripture query (APO-7384); Express Checkout on_behalf_of; [Giving] Fix funds changing across page reloads on Transactions Tab
Linear completed: APO-6690 When entering bank details manually, you see an error message
Linear worked on: APO-7269 Apple Pay not working in desktop Safari; APO-6690 bank details error
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-cluster

PR reviews; experimented with Airlock; rebased Recon Dashboard PRs; Dev Chat; Linear project sync; PR to enable giving on web for non–full-platform churches and LD flag
PR reviews: New createOrUpdateGiveIntent mutation; [APO-7205] Fallback for non CHIPS browsers; feat(recurring-gifts): recurring gifts with filtering, cancel, resume
Linear worked on: APO-7097 Reconciliation Endpoints/Dashboard; APO-6612 Update how we redirect to PushPay
Linear created: APO-7472 Express Checkout Button in dark mode should be a different color than black
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-cluster

Thought leader for Team Retro Part 1 (sailboat retro: wind/sun/anchors/reefs; heat-mapping; theme discussion)
Called out unclear reporting structure (everyone reporting to one person; need to bubble up to managers/project leads)
Called out weeknight rotation miss (asked in Slack for a schedule, no one took lead, everyone felt obligated)
Asked whether we’re hiring or adding payment-domain engineering expertise if there’s a capability gap
Framed the fix as structural, not behavioral (ownership, process, accountability vs. leadership “backing off”)
Pushed for role clarity from company North Star → quarterly goals → how each person owns rocks and a roadmap for the quarter with clear sprint definition; cited working at different altitudes and no one connecting them
Slack comment (cited in retro): product process doesn’t replace org structure; someone must own the roadmap and know what each dev is working on; leadership must define who owns the roadmap, who builds the sprint, and when it’s reviewed
Retro; restacking Recon Dashboard PR; figuring out OpenAI spike in usage
PR review: New createOrUpdateGiveIntent mutation
Linear worked on: APO-7177 move reconciliation utilities to util directory (#2483)
Repos: apollos-cluster, apollos-shovel

Co-working w/ Tyler, Shahbano, and Matt
Project meeting; QA issue verification, PRs, and assigning; PR reviews for Vincent Wilson
PR reviews: Limit number of pages to embed for voice QA; Add Docker support for admin app with GHCR publishing
Linear completed: APO-6702 Signing Out not persisted through refresh
Linear worked on: APO-7344 Open Powered by Apollos Link in New Tab; APO-6846 [Web Giving] Remove "Now" on Give button; APO-6721 Loading payment options copy change; APO-6702 Signing Out not persisted
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-shovel
